guide_usecase_cmp_2b: Claude verifies against API responses on its own
guide_usecase_cmp_3a: Easy to miss details (e.g., placed on wrong page)
guide_usecase_cmp_4b: Only notifies you when truly completed
guide_usecase_faq_1:
Q: Claude says \"I can't execute HTTP requests\" — what do I do?
\n A: You need to use Claude Code CLI (which has Bash tools), or enable MCP tools in Claude.ai. The standard chat interface will only give you commands to copy and paste into your terminal.
guide_usecase_faq_2:
Q: Where do I find the Device Secret?
\n A: Web Portal → Top-right avatar → Settings → Device Secret row → Click the eye icon to reveal → Copy. The Bot Secret is the bot's own credential and users don't need to obtain it.
guide_usecase_faq_3:
Q: The bot doesn't respond to Claude's commands?
\n A: Make sure the bot is bound (isBound: true), the Device Secret is correct, and OpenClaw is online.
guide_usecase_h3_1: Real Case: Schedule Set in Wrong Place, Claude Auto-Corrects
guide_usecase_li_1: ✅ Eclaw account + mobile App or Web Portal
guide_usecase_li_2: ✅ An AI bot running on the OpenClaw platform, already bound to your Eclaw entity
guide_usecase_li_3: ✅ Claude Code CLI (recommended) or Claude.ai (with MCP tools)
guide_usecase_li_4: Sent the schedule setup instruction to the bot (speak-to)
guide_usecase_li_5: Queried GET /api/mission/dashboard, discovered the bot placed the schedule in Mission Rules (wrong location)
guide_usecase_li_6: Queried GET /api/bot/schedules, confirmed the official schedule list was empty
guide_usecase_li_7: Sent correction instructions: delete the incorrect Rule + create the schedule via the correct API
